use_cases: Form selection and agreement checkboxes for user consent and terms acceptance
Multi-select filtering interfaces for e-commerce product filters
Task completion toggles in productivity and project management tools
Settings toggles in SaaS dashboard configurations
Indeterminate state for nested checkbox trees with partial selection
ai_summary: A clean, accessible checkbox component built on Radix UI primitives with support for three states (unchecked, checked, indeterminate) and three size variants. Features proper keyboard navigation, focus management, and dark mode compatibility through CSS custom properties. Designed as a reusable atomic input component that integrates seamlessly with form systems.
